---
title: "The AI &amp; Machine Learning Encyclopedia"
description: "A comprehensive, plain-English reference for the whole field of artificial intelligence and machine learning — every major topic explained as an intuition-first, example-rich guide with interactive demos and visualizations."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

A complete, plain-English reference for the **entire field of AI and machine learning** — from the mathematics underneath it, through classical ML, deep learning, reinforcement learning, and the language/vision/multimodal frontier, to classical symbolic AI, applied systems, and the production, ethics, and research directions shaping what comes next. **46 chapters across 13 parts.**

Every chapter is a clear, **intuition-first explainer** — flowing guide-style prose that builds each idea step by step, with a diagram, formula, snippet of code, or small visual wherever it makes the concept click. (If you want interview-style question-and-answer drills instead, see the [Interview Handbook](interview-guide.html).)

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**How to use this:** each chapter is its own fast-loading page. Read one top to bottom to learn the subfield, then follow the *See also* links to related chapters. Every page has *prev / next* links and a *jump-to-any-chapter* menu at the top.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 🗺️ The map of AI &amp; ML — 46 chapters {#map}

**🧮 Mathematical Foundations** — *linear algebra, calculus, optimization, probability & statistics*

- [**01.** 🧮 Linear Algebra](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch01.html)
- [**02.** ∂ Calculus & Differentiation](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch02.html)
- [**03.** 📉 Optimization](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch03.html)
- [**04.** 🎲 Probability & Statistics](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch04.html)

**🧭 The ML Workflow** — *what AI/ML is, preparing data, and reducing dimensions*

- [**05.** 🌐 AI, ML & the Learning Process](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch05.html)
- [**06.** 🧹 Data Preprocessing](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch06.html)
- [**07.** 🗜️ Dimensionality Reduction](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch07.html)

**🧩 Classical Machine Learning** — *regression, classification, ensembles, clustering, evaluation*

- [**08.** 📈 Regression](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch08.html)
- [**09.** 📐 Classification Algorithms](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch09.html)
- [**10.** 🌳 Ensemble Methods](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch10.html)
- [**11.** 🔮 Clustering & Unsupervised Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch11.html)
- [**12.** 🎯 Model Evaluation & Tuning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch12.html)

**🎲 Probabilistic Models** — *graphical models and structured uncertainty*

- [**13.** 🕸️ Probabilistic Graphical Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch13.html)

**🧠 Deep Learning** — *neural nets, CNNs, RNNs, transformers, and generative models*

- [**14.** 🧠 Neural Networks (Core)](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch14.html)
- [**15.** 🖼️ Convolutional Neural Networks](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch15.html)
- [**16.** 🔁 Recurrent & Sequence Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch16.html)
- [**17.** ⚡ Attention & Transformers](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch17.html)
- [**18.** 🎨 Generative Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch18.html)

**🗣️ Applied AI: Vision, Language, Audio & Time** — *CV, NLP, speech, time series, LLMs, multimodal*

- [**19.** 👁️ Computer Vision](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch19.html)
- [**20.** 💬 Natural Language Processing](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch20.html)
- [**21.** 🔊 Speech & Audio Processing](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch21.html)
- [**22.** ⏳ Time Series & Forecasting](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch22.html)
- [**23.** 📚 Large Language Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch23.html)
- [**24.** 🌈 Multimodal AI](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch24.html)

**🕹️ Reinforcement Learning** — *learning to act from reward*

- [**25.** 🕹️ Reinforcement Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch25.html)

**🛠️ Applied ML Systems & Industries** — *recommenders, fraud detection, and real-world applications*

- [**26.** 🛒 Recommender Systems](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch26.html)
- [**27.** 🚨 Anomaly & Fraud Detection](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch27.html)
- [**28.** 🏦 ML Across Industries](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch28.html)

**🚀 Production, Tooling & Infrastructure** — *MLOps, scaling, and the ML toolkit*

- [**29.** 🔧 MLOps & Deployment](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch29.html)
- [**30.** 🚀 AI Infrastructure & Efficient Inference](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch30.html)
- [**31.** 🧰 Tools & Frameworks](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch31.html)

**📚 Classical & Symbolic AI** — *search, logic, planning, and evolutionary methods*

- [**32.** 🧭 Search & Problem Solving](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch32.html)
- [**33.** 📖 Knowledge Representation & Reasoning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch33.html)
- [**34.** 🗺️ Planning, Constraint Satisfaction & Game Playing](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch34.html)
- [**35.** 🧬 Evolutionary Computation & Metaheuristics](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch35.html)

**⚖️ Responsible AI & Frontier** — *interpretability, causality, ethics, and what is next*

- [**36.** 🔍 Explainable AI & Interpretability](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch36.html)
- [**37.** 🧷 Causal Inference](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch37.html)
- [**38.** ⚖️ AI Ethics, Fairness & Safety](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch38.html)
- [**39.** 🌠 Frontier & Emerging Directions](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch39.html)

**🎓 Advanced & Specialized Topics** — *graph ML, robotics, learning theory, retrieval/data-mining, and building LLMs*

- [**40.** 🔗 Graph Machine Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch40.html)
- [**41.** 🤖 Robotics & Autonomy](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch41.html)
- [**42.** 📐 Learning Theory](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch42.html)
- [**43.** 🔎 Information Retrieval & Data Mining](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch43.html)
- [**44.** 🏗️ LLM Systems: Building LLMs from Scratch](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch44.html)

**🎚️ Post-Training & Fine-Tuning** — *transfer, PEFT/LoRA/QLoRA, alignment (RLHF/DPO), distillation, and evaluation*

- [**45.** 🎚️ Post-Training I — Transfer, Fine-Tuning & PEFT](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch45.html)
- [**46.** 🏅 Post-Training II — Alignment & Evaluation](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch46.html)
